F07 Order Management: Cartâ†’addressâ†’paymentâ†’approve creates the order, issues an order number, decrements stock, and sends notifications.
Orders from the last year list 10 per page; status/period filters work as expected.
Only allowed transitions succeed; disallowed transitions (e.g., SHIPPEDâ†’PENDING) return HTTP 400.
PAID orders prior to shipping can be cancelled immediately; refund is wired to the PG cancel call.
Cancel some items while letting the rest ship normally.
Exchanges allowed within 7 days of receipt; reason and photo upload are required; admin approval is needed.
Returns allowed within 7 days of receipt; buyer-remorse deducts shipping; defects are free.
Partial order-number search; orders the user lacks permission for are excluded from results.
Admin can filter by period/status and download CSV (UTF-8 with BOM).
F08 Shipping & Logistics: Within 24h of PAID, dispatching issues a waybill mapped to the order.
Querying the carrier API by waybill shows 5 states (acceptâ†’hubâ†’linehaulâ†’deliveryâ†’complete).
Region-average lead time is computed and shown on order detail and notifications.
Address can be changed only before 'preparing to ship'; once waybill is issued, change is blocked.
Calculated from country/weight/EMS rate table; tariff/VAT shown separately.
Absent recipient / wrong address / unreachable codes can be selected; redelivery date is proposed automatically.
Postcode whitelist match auto-charges an additional 3,000 KRW.
Free shipping applies automatically at â‰Ą50,000 KRW; below shows the gap-to-threshold notice.
After choosing an offline store, shipping fee is 0; the store receives an SMS notice.
F09 Reviews & Ratings: Reviews are allowed only for DELIVERED orders; others return 403 from the backend.
Missing rating rejects submission; only integers 1â€“5 are accepted.
JPG/PNG up to 5MB each; a 6th image is rejected.
A banned-word dictionary plus variant matching auto-masks or routes to admin moderation.
Each user toggles 'helpful' once per review; counter updates immediately.
After 3 reports, the review enters admin review and is hidden temporarily.
Hiding a review enqueues a recalculation of the product's average rating.
On write/delete/hide, average rating is recomputed asynchronously on a 1-minute cadence.
Sort selection reflects in URL query and is stable within the same option.
